claim_boundary: Open-development whole-parent OOF surrogate of independent 8X6B/9E6Y computational Docking geometry only; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, sealed V4-F evidence, or submission truth.

frozen_m2_c2_outer_oof.permitted_role: outer-test M2/C2 evidence only; it must not replace fold-local inner OOF reconstruction for meta fitting

lane_roles.selection_policy: The formal primary lane is fixed before cross-lane outer metrics. B and E_DETACHED may be reported as diagnostics but cannot replace E_SHARED after metrics are observed.
lane_roles.detached_claim_boundary: E_DETACHED has no direct contact-loss autograd path into the shared encoder, but it is not dynamics-independent because global clip_grad_norm_ spans all trainable parameters and can indirectly rescale scalar-branch updates.

contact_feature_policy.reason: The frozen prediction writer persists only contact_score_R8 and contact_score_R9. Any unavailable contact summaries cannot be reconstructed post hoc or silently added to this version.
contact_feature_policy.source: immutable per-seed score_predictions_no_metrics.tsv files, hash-verified against each RESULT.json
contact_feature_policy.outer_ensemble: arithmetic mean across seeds 43,97,193 after candidate/fold/lane closure

formula.parameter_sharing: w_E,w_C2,beta_C are shared across R8 and R9

fit_objective.rows: outer-train candidates carrying strictly inner-OOF base predictions only
fit_objective.sample_weighting: equal teacher source, then equal parent, then equal candidate
fit_objective.data_term: mean Huber loss over direct R8 and R9 with beta=0.03
fit_objective.optimizer: deterministic constrained SLSQP or an equivalent convex solver with KKT/constraint validation

used_when: meta fit is invalid or violates constraints
exact_m2_fallback.fallback_output: exact frozen M2 direct R8/R9 predictions and exact-min dual

for_each_outer_fold: Select the frozen E_SHARED H0/H1/H2 configuration using only the five outer-train inner folds and the already frozen selection order.
Reconstruct selected-H E_SHARED inner OOF R8/R9/contact_score_R8/contact_score_R9 from hash-verified per-job TSVs; each outer-train candidate appears exactly once.
Recompute M2 and C2 inner OOF evidence inside the same outer-train partition; all C2 scaling, filtering, PCA and Ridge fitting are inner-train-only.
Fit robust contact scaling and the constrained meta parameters using only outer-train inner-OOF rows.
Use the three frozen outer-refit seeds to form E_SHARED outer-test mean R8/R9/contact scores; seed standard deviations are diagnostic only and not primary predictors.
Read frozen fold-matched M2/C2 outer-test predictions, apply the outer-train contact transform and meta parameters, and derive exact-min dual.
Emit outer-test predictions once; outer-test truth is used only after predictions and all fit artifacts are frozen.

diagnostic_outputs.uncertainty: three-seed standard deviations may be reported descriptively but are not predictors in the formal primary stack

promotion_gate.decision: PROMOTE only the frozen M2_C2_E_SHARED_CONTACT2D_CONSTRAINED_STACK if every criterion passes; otherwise DO_NOT_PROMOTE and retain exact M2 fallback.

prohibitions: B or E_DETACHED replacing E_SHARED as the formal primary
outer-test rows used for meta fit, scaling, calibration, hyperparameter selection, or reliability fit
same-row base prediction used to train and evaluate the meta-head
candidate ID, parent ID, campaign ID, source ID, fold ID, or seed ID used as a predictor
contact score treated as an R prediction or differenced against M2
unpersisted 14D contact summaries reconstructed or added post hoc
R_dual_min predicted as an independent free output
post-result gate, feature, formula, or hyperparameter changes
